title: Digital Communication Senior Executive - Contract Role
description:
• Work Location - Central Region
  • Working Hours - Mon to Thurs 8.30am - 6pm, Fri 8.30am - 5.30pm
  • Monthly Salary - up to $6500 per month
  • 12 Months Contract, Govt Agencies

Job Scope:

  • Curate, review, and optimise content across social media platforms and corporate website.
  • Track, analyse, and interpret performance metrics to improve content effectiveness.
  • Support planning and execution of digital communications campaigns to boost public engagement.
  • Develop and adapt digital content, including copy, visuals, and multimedia, for campaigns.
  • Collaborate with internal teams and external vendors to ensure consistent messaging.
  • Identify content opportunities and apply relevant best practices.

Requirements:

  • Degree in Business, Communication, or related field.
  • 3+ years’ experience in social media management, digital campaigns, or content creation.
  • Proven track record in planning and executing campaigns that drive engagement and growth.
  • Skilled at collaborating with stakeholders and working in cross-functional teams.
  • Strong project management, able to multi-task with attention to quality and detail.
  • Proactive self-starter, taking ownership from ideation to execution.
  • Hands-on with paid social media strategies; familiar with design and analytics tools (e.g., Canva, Adobe Illustrator/Photoshop, Meta Business Suite, Google Analytics).

Interested candidates, kindly email your resume to: zuli.ng@tg-hr.com

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
APBA TG Human Resource Pte Ltd

(a wholly owned subsidiary of the TG Group)


TG Group (“TG”) is a global workforce solutions provider with an international reach in over 50 markets across the globe. Headquartered in Singapore with Shanghai Foreign Service (Group) Co Ltd ("FSG") as a strategic shareholder, TG delivers a comprehensive suite of innovative human capital solutions to help our clients achieve greater business success.

TG adopts a future-centric approach where we aspire to be at the forefront of the evolution of the future of work. We believe that human capital is the greatest asset to any institution. With a wealth of experience in the Human Resources (HR) industry, we combine our international expertise and local know-how to deliver bespoke and innovative workforce solutions.

Our diverse portfolio of client-centric workforce solutions includes Contingent Workforce Management (CWM), Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Permanent Placements, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), Professional Employer Organisation (PEO), and Payroll Process Outsourcing (PPO).
postedCompany.name: APBA TG HUMAN RESOURCE PTE. LTD.
